actionUnits.condition: Trigger public no-arg methods on ShowMessageFromList (MonoBehaviour script_fileID: 1521713936, guid: 9be2df20dd4c2d74a92ddf9be77c7a94) to advance and rewind the message index. Goal: force wrap-around in NextMessage to invoke OnComplete, which has a PersistentCall to GameObject(fileID: 259193821).SetActive(false). Note: This object has no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger; manual method triggering is used to exercise MonoBehaviour APIs. Messages list must contain at least 1 element to avoid exceptions.
